title: Cloudflare MCP handoff commit blocked
body: Commit attempt for claim 3c46a2aa-7d1c-4968-9cad-178062319b85 failed in the pre-commit formatting gate because active Mossy identity WIP has Prettier failures in agent-tools/docs/agent-identity.md and agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/identity-audit.ts. Queue intent 3d875549-a9de-4a20-a8a4-cc28797fb413 is abandoned and the staged bundle was unstaged; no no-verify authorisation exists.
